pi_items.source: Found in setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and task description

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated 10-slice DICOM series created by setup_task.sh. The target export directory is exactly /home/ga/DICOM/exports/key_images. The agent is strictly expected to export exactly 2 JPEG files representing the bookmarked key images, each with a minimum file size of 10000 bytes. All these parameters are explicitly matched against the task's setup, export, and verifier scripts.
